description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named sw that runs on push, pull request, and a daily schedule. The workflow should have three jobs: windows, linux, and macos. Each job should check out the repository, run the egorpugin/sw-action, and upload artifacts. The windows job runs on windows-2022, the linux job runs on ubuntu-22.04 in a fedora container, and the macos job runs on macos-latest.
